text:

Log:
  Move the pidfile from /var/run/sec.pid to /var/run/sec/sec.pid
  and chown /var/run/sec when sec_user is set.

  PR:		227056
  Reviewed by:	ler (mentor)
  Approved by:	ecu@200ok.org, ler (mentor)

  head/sysutils/sec/files/sec.in
